overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a red beanie walking through a futuristic urban commercial district. The character walks alongside a companion past large holographic billboards and enters a plaza with a food stand, under bright midday sunlight.

events.description: white van drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a companion, passing large holographic billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the player character
white van driving down the street past the player

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying 'Feel the Chemistry' advertisement with purple and pink neon colors
large yellow billboard with cartoon burger character and text
green elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player character walks along a narrow commercial sidewalk with a companion, passing vibrant holographic billboards on the left wall. A white van drives past on the right while the elevated highway structure looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between narrow street and open plaza

events.description: passing a street pole that temporarily blocks part of the view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a street pole while the companion moves ahead and raises their hand

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead and raising their hand in a gesture

entered.detail: tall metal street pole with fixtures
small food vendor stand with blue 'Circus' awning visible in the distance
wide concrete staircase leading up to the elevated structure
large cylindrical industrial silo or tank structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a street pole as the purple billboard falls behind. The yellow burger billboard moves closer on the left while the Circus food stand and concrete stairs come into view ahead. The companion moves ahead and gestures toward the destination.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with food stand and stair access

events.description: entering the open plaza area from the narrow street, approaching the food stand

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Circus food stand in the open plaza area

entered.detail: horizontal metal slatted fence marking the plaza boundary

segments.scene_description: The character enters the open plaza, leaving the billboards behind. The Circus food stand becomes the focal point ahead while the concrete stairs rise on the right. The industrial silo and metal fence define the left boundary of this paved gathering space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit commercial corridor into a wide, sunlit urban plaza. It begins with the character and a companion walking along a sidewalk, passing vibrant holographic billboards while a white van drives past and an elevated highway looms in the distance. As the purple billboard recedes, the camera tracks forward past a street pole toward a yellow burger advertisement, bringing a food stand and concrete stairs into view. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the billboards behind and enters a paved gathering space. Finally, the camera centers on the Circus food stand, framed by rising concrete stairs on the right and an industrial silo with a metal fence on the left.
